connection: Donovan McNabb, Carson Wentz, Nick Foles, and Jalen Hurts all started at quarterback for the Philadelphia Eagles. Dak Prescott is the longtime starter for the Dallas Cowboys — the Eagles' biggest rival.
hints: The connection is about an NFL position on a specific team.
Four of these players have started at quarterback for the Eagles.
One starts for the team Eagles fans hate most — he's never worn midnight green.
